title: Feature: Option so select multiple Connections at the Overview menue
author: Chrisu02
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->

## Expected Behavior
It would be awsome to have a multiple selection possibility like at windows with "shift" for Connection from - to, or Control to select multiple specific Connection
Then you only have to press right click to one of this connection, select the Task / external Program and it will be executed to any of the selected connection.

## Current Behavior
Currently you have to enter the Submenu of each Connecti...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Thank you for the feedback @Chrisu02! Multi-selection with right-click context menu **does** work in the latest nightly build — including **External Applications**, which will run on all selected connections simultaneously.

Here's what's enabled when multiple connections are selected:
- **Connect** — opens all selected connections
- **External Applications** — runs the tool against each selected connection
- **Disconnect / Reconnect** — works on all selected
- **Delete / Copy / Move Up / Move D...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Feature request to enable multi-selection of connections in the Overview/Connections tree panel for bulk operations
Approach: Enable multi-select mode on the connections TreeView/ObjectListView control and wire up context menu actions to operate on all selected nodes
